title: STM32WL: verify SubGHz RX uses RFBUSY/interrupt not polling
description: firmware/bridge-stm32wl mentions busy polling in iv.rs. STM32WL has dedicated SUBGHZ_IRQn interrupt. Verify RX path uses interrupt, not polling. If polling, convert to interrupt-driven.
close_reason: Verified compliant: RX path uses interrupt-driven await_irq() with IRQ_SIGNAL.wait().await. wait_on_busy() is for SPI sync (now yields with Timer::after_micros)
